message:
🌱 cloud-custodian: Access Key Groupings (#1850)

* 🌱 Add cloud-custodian: Access Key Groupings mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add cloud-custodian: Access Key Groupings mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cloud-custodian-842-access-key-groupings",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cloud-custodian: Access Key Groupings",
+    "description": "Access Key Groupings. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cloud-custodian deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cloud-custodian version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cloud-custodian -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-custodian
helm list -n cloud-custodian 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cloud-custodian installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cloud-custodian configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cloud-custodian configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cloud-custodian -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-custodian
kubectl get configmap -n cloud-custodian -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cloud-custodian
```
If an IAM account has never been used the "access_keys.last_used_date" will be absent.  I want to disable access keys that have never been used AND the last rotated key is greater than 60 days."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Access Key Groupings",
+        "description": "parse is not needed as k['CreateDate'] is already a datetime object.

Adjusting the policy in https://github.com/capitalone/cloud-custodian/issues/842 and setting the `action` phase to the following solves this issue.

```
    actions:
      - type: remove-keys
        disable: true
        age:
```yaml
name: iam_accounts-disable-never_used
    description: |
       Disable IAM accounts that have never been used in the last 60 days
    resource: iam-user
    filters:
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.active
        value: true
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.last_used_date
        value: absent
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.last_rotated
        value_type: age
        value: 60
        op: gte
    actions:
      - type: remove-keys
        age: 60
        disable: true
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cloud-custodian -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cloud-custodian
kubectl get events -n cloud-custodian --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Access Key Groupings" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "parse is not needed as k['CreateDate'] is already a datetime object.

Adjusting the policy in https://github.com/capitalone/cloud-custodian/issues/842 and setting the `action` phase to the following solves this issue.

```
    actions:
      - type: remove-keys
        disable: true
        age: 90
```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "name: iam_accounts-disable-never_used
    description: |
       Disable IAM accounts that have never been used in the last 60 days
    resource: iam-user
    filters:
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.active
        value: true
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.last_used_date
        value: absent
      - type: credential
        key: access_keys.last_rotated
        value_type: age
        value: 60
        op: gte
    actions:
      - type: remove-keys
        age: 60
        disable: true",
+        "[
  {
    "UserName": "read-s3",
    "c7n:credential-report": {
      "password_next_rotation": null,
      "password_enabled": false,
      "access_keys": [
        {
          "active": true,
          "last_rotated": "2016-12-23T15:55:44+00:00",
          "last_used_date": null,
          "last_used_service": null,
          "last_used_region": null
        },
        {
          "active": true,
          "last_rotated": "2016-09-26T18:39:07+00:00",
          "last_used_region": null,
          "last_used_date": "2017-01-09T23:21:00+00:00",
          "last_used_service": "s3"
        }
      ],
      "user_creation_time": "2016-09-26T18:39:07+00:00",
      "mfa_active": false,
      "arn": "arn:aws:iam::xxxxxxx:user/read-s3",
      "password_last_used": null,
      "password_last_change",
+        "actions:
      - type: remove-keys
        disable: true
        age: 90"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cloud-custodian",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cloud-custodian"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cloud-custodian/cloud-custodian/issues/842",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cloud-custodian/cloud-custodian",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cloud-custodian/cloud-custodian/pull/1489"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cloud-custodian installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:39:06.211Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
